pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It's a little intense in here with everyone eyeing the prize, so I figured I'd say hi and break the ice. What's your story—are you here for something specific?
Nice to meet you, C, I'm D. It's definitely a bit heavy in here. I'm just looking to win for my family and get things back on track. What about you?
Honestly, same. I want to make sure the people I love are taken care of. It’s a lot of pressure, isn’t it?
It really is. It’s hard not to feel the weight of it when you know exactly what’s at stake for the people back home.
Exactly. It makes every move feel so much heavier, but that's also what's driving me to win this.
I feel that. Having people counting on you changes the whole game, doesn't it?
It really does. It turns a game into a responsibility. Do you think people here are going to work together, or is it going to be every person for themselves?
I’d like to think we can find a way to work together, but honestly, I’m expecting people to get pretty competitive once things really start.
I'm worried about that too. It only takes one person to turn it into a free-for-all, but I'd much rather have an ally than another rival.
I'm with you on that. Having someone to watch your back makes a huge difference. Let's try to look out for each other when the game starts.
Sounds like a plan. I'm glad we talked, D—it feels good to have an ally. Let's make this happen for our families.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I couldn't agree more. It was a pleasure working together to ensure a fair outcome for both of us. Perfect cooperation indeed!
